archetype.rationale: Kazakh yurt logo, gold storefront, and table spreads of plov and laghman — the room and the plate tell the story.

runner_up_rejected.name: HIGH VOLUME
runner_up_rejected.reason: Small sit-down room with woven lamps, not a fast counter chain.

category.evidence: Business name, HALAL tag, guest photos of plov, laghman, manti.

price_level.evidence: No menu board prices scraped yet.

customer_type.value: Tourists, expats, and Russian-speaking guests in Mỹ An, Đà Nẵng
customer_type.evidence: Address on Bà Huyện Thanh Quan; Central Asian cuisine niche.

main_selling_point.value: Halal Central Asian cooking — plov, laghman, manti — in one designed room.
main_selling_point.evidence: Name, photos, Kazakhstan flag in window.

competitive_advantage.value: Rare Central Asian halal option in Đà Nẵng's Mỹ An dining area.
competitive_advantage.evidence: Cuisine positioning vs typical Vietnamese-only or generic Asian spots nearby.

design_direction.tone: Warm gold and charcoal — steppe hospitality, not generic Asian fusion.
design_direction.color: Gold accent from storefront sign, charcoal stone walls.
design_direction.layout_rhythm: Open hero, dense food photography, calm visit block.
design_direction.imagery_priority: Guest table shots and storefront at night.
